creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: miwi
Date: Wed Jun  4 11:49:49 UTC 2014
New revision: 356472
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/356472

Log:
  This extension provides an API for communicating with Redis database,
  a persistent key-value database with built-in net interface written
  in ANSI-C for Posix systems.

  It is a fork of alfonsojimenez's phpredis, adding many methods and
  fixing a lot of issues.

  WWW: https://github.com/nicolasff/phpredis

  PR:		ports/189414
  Submitted by:	Arjan Koole <arjan@blackoak.net>

Changes:
  head/databases/Makefile
  head/databases/php55-redis/
  head/databases/php55-redis/Makefile
  head/databases/php55-redis/distinfo
  head/databases/php55-redis/pkg-descr
